title: Hilt Setup, Room Migration, and State Preservation Complete
objective: Integrate Room Database, configure Hilt DI architecture, and implement UI state preservation in MainActivity
completed: MainActivity: Saved activeProfileName, chatLogs, and diagnostics state in onSaveInstanceState and restored them in onCreate
build.gradle.kts: Added Hilt and KSP plugins to root build file
app/build.gradle.kts: Applied Hilt and KSP plugins, added Room and Hilt library dependencies
AndroidManifest.xml: Registered the Hilt-enabled GeminiLiveApp application class
GeminiLiveApp: Created new Application class with @HiltAndroidApp annotation
AppDatabase: Created unified Room Database containing MemoryEntry, VehicleMemory, DateProfile, and Meeting entities and DAOs with SQLCipher factory
DiModules: Created Hilt module providing AppPreferences, AppDatabase, and DAOs
MemoryDbHelper: Refactored to delegate database queries to Room MemoryDao
LocalVehicleDbHelper: Refactored to delegate database queries to Room VehicleDao
DateProfileDbHelper: Refactored to delegate database queries to Room DateProfileDao
MeetingDbHelper: Refactored to delegate database queries to Room MeetingDao
Verified all 56 unit and static code analysis tests pass successfully (BUILD SUCCESSFUL)
next_steps: Analyze remaining minor bugs and code cleanups: Thai localization, DiffUtil integration in list adapters, release minification optimization
context_summary: Successfully set up Hilt dependency injection structure and fully migrated the custom SQLite Helper classes (MemoryDbHelper, LocalVehicleDbHelper, DateProfileDbHelper, MeetingDbHelper) to delegate queries to Room DAOs under a unified, SQLCipher-encrypted AppDatabase. Implemented robust UI state preservation in MainActivity to persist active dating profile, chat logs, and diagnostics. Verified that all 56/56 unit and static tests pass perfectly.
